Fields.Name: Disable Param - Network Test
Fields.Description: Parameters marked with  are excluded in the NT version package.

Fields.Name: Pre-conversion - Map Image R
Fields.Description: Color information (R) of the map image before conversion. Pixels with matching RGB values are associated with this parameter

Fields.Name: Pre-conversion - Map Image G
Fields.Description: Color information (G) of the map image before conversion. Pixels with matching RGB values are associated with this parameter

Fields.Name: Pre-conversion - Map Image B
Fields.Description: Color information (B) of the map image before conversion. Pixels with matching RGB values are associated with this parameter

Fields.Name: Mimicry Establishment Param ID
Fields.Description: Mimicry probability parameter ID by map (-1 No setting (default value)). The area is combined with Map Studio
